message:
fix(logger,notifications): set 0o600 permissions on log file creation (bd-vt1)

JSONL logger and notification file writer used OpenOptions without
explicit mode, inheriting the default umask. Apply 0o600 on Unix so
log files containing path and pressure details are owner-only accessible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
